description: Small, source-verified bibliographic corrections used by the public artifact explorer. Placeholder and collective corpus authors are deliberately not promoted as named mathematicians.

paper:1111.0931.name: Period functions and cotangent sums
paper:1111.0931.citation: Sandro Bettin and Brian Conrey, “Period functions and cotangent sums,” Algebra & Number Theory 7 (2013), no. 1, 215–242.

paper:1601.06839.name: Reciprocity Theorems for Bettin--Conrey Sums
paper:1601.06839.citation: Juan S. Auli, Abdelmejid Bayad, and Matthias Beck, “Reciprocity Theorems for Bettin--Conrey Sums,” Acta Arithmetica 181 (2017), 297–319.

artifacts.name: Über die Anzahl der Primzahlen unter einer gegebenen Grösse
artifacts.citation: Bernhard Riemann, “Über die Anzahl der Primzahlen unter einer gegebenen Grösse,” Monatsberichte der Berliner Akademie, November 1859.

artifacts.name: On the One-dimensional Translation Group and Semi-group in Certain Function Spaces
artifacts.citation: Bertil Nyman, On the One-dimensional Translation Group and Semi-group in Certain Function Spaces, Uppsala, 1950.

artifacts.name: A closure problem related to the Riemann zeta-function
artifacts.journal: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 41 (1955), no. 5, 312–314
artifacts.citation: Arne Beurling, “A closure problem related to the Riemann zeta-function,” Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 41 (1955), no. 5, 312–314.

artifacts.name: A strengthening of the Nyman--Beurling criterion for the Riemann Hypothesis
artifacts.citation: Luis Báez-Duarte, “A strengthening of the Nyman--Beurling criterion for the Riemann Hypothesis,” arXiv:math/0202141 (2002).
